chain.thought: Explanation: Count the number of singles per album that charted with a numeric position. For 24/7: "summergirls", "24/7", "i like it", "sunshine", and "never 2 much of u" (5 singles). For swingin': "romeo" and "gentle" (2 singles). For the way i am: "ooh child" (1 single; "endlessly" did not chart). Therefore, 24/7 had the most top singles.

judge_thought: Explanation: The album "24/7" has the most charting singles on the Billboard Hot 100: "Summergirls" (50), "24/7" (42), "I Like It" (7), "Sunshine" (23), and "Never 2 Much of U" (61), totaling five. "Swingin'" has two ("Romeo" 6, "Gentle" 31), and "The Way I Am" has one ("Ooh Child" 27; "Endlessly" did not chart). Therefore, "24/7" had the most top singles.
